_comment: Tunable parameters for draft_grades.py. The projection_tiers list is ordered by ascending max_rank; the last tier MUST have max_rank=null (open-ended). To revert to a 2-tier system, drop the Top 25 entry. To change the scale, edit base_points across all tiers proportionally.

projection_tiers.name: Top 25
projection_tiers._calibration_note: Empirical EV per rank-1-25 player = 8.67 WAR. Compressed to 7.0 to preserve grading depth-sensitivity (full empirical ratio would dominate vDraft+).

projection_tiers.name: Top 100
projection_tiers._calibration_note: Empirical EV per rank-26-100 player = 2.69-3.45 WAR (gradient inside this band).

projection_tiers.name: Later
projection_tiers._calibration_note: Empirical EV per rank-101+ player = 0.75-1.88 WAR (depending on rank within band). Open-ended; covers everyone past Top 100.

managed_risk._comment: Partial credit for in-round reaches (player taken before projection but within one round). Applied regardless of which projection tier the player was in.

delta_bonus._formula: log_bonus = log_scale * ln(1 + max(0, overall - projection))
delta_bonus._comment: Steal bonus added to the projection tier's base_points when a player is taken at or beyond their projected rank.

_grade_bands_comment: Per-team letter grades, assigned by position within the league's points range. Top 20% of teams = A, next 20% = B, etc.
